items.title: Settings page header, tab bar, and tab router
items.scope: frontend — populate SHELL-09 content slot with settings-main (ai_RNbBHYUr): page header, horizontal settings-tab-bar, settings_tab_os_ custom-state router toggling eight tab panels under G - settings (ai_RNbBHYVF); no tab panel internals
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsMain.vue mounts inside SettingsPage content slot with data-bubble-id="ai_RNbBHYUr" preserving settings-content-wrapper (ai_RNbBHYUs), settings-page-header (ai_RNbBHYUt), and settings-tab-bar (ai_RNbBHYUw) hierarchy

AC-2: Eight tab buttons (ai_RNbBHYUx through ai_RNbBHYVE) set settings_tab_os_ state using ENUM-01 slug keys (bTIiw–bTIjJ) and show exactly one G - * panel under ai_RNbBHYVF matching Bubble conditional visibility
AC-3: Tab bar style_ref on ai_RNbBHYUw resolves through ir/slices/styles.json; sidebar crisis card remains mounted via SHELL-02 bTIfa host and CRISIS-01 — not reimplemented in this item
items.layout_notes: Mount inside SHELL-09 boundary; ~669-entity page slice — this item owns chrome + tab state only. Tab bar is horizontal button row with wrap on narrow viewports. CrisisSupportCard on settings route comes from sidebar CustomElement bTIfa (ai_RNbBKLUq instance), not settings-main.

items.title: Profile tab form and save workflow
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - profile (ai_RNbBHYVG): profile-form-card with name/email inputs, recovery section, sobriety date picker, and profile-save-btn workflow updating CurrentUser via Supabase client (read project/ for field names only)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsProfileTab.vue renders ai_RNbBHYVG with data-bubble-id on profile-form-card (ai_RNbBHYVH), profile-form (ai_RNbBHYVL), profile-recovery-section (ai_RNbBHYWA), and profile-sobriety-group (ai_RNbBHYWF)
AC-2: Inp - first name (ai_RNbBHYVO), Inp - email (ai_RNbBHYVR), and DTP - sobriety start date (ai_RNbBHYWH) bind to user fields with IR placeholders and style_ref tokens — no generic form styling
AC-3: profile-save-btn (ai_RNbBHYWT) triggers workflow bTIhq parity: persist profile changes for current user then refresh bound form state
items.layout_notes: ~40 entities under profile panel; card stack with header, form rows, recovery callout, and footer save aligned to Bubble column layout with fit_width fluid semantics.

items.title: Coaching preferences tab and save workflow
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - coaching (ai_RNbBHYWU): coaching-form-card, DD - coaching mode dropdown (bTIiC/bTIhA), disclaimer banner, and coaching-save-btn updating ai_coaching_mode_os on user via Supabase client
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsCoachingTab.vue preserves ai_RNbBHYWU tree with data-bubble-id on coaching-form-card (ai_RNbBHYWV), coaching-card-header (ai_RNbBHYWW), and coaching-form (ai_RNbBHYWZ)
AC-2: Coaching mode dropdown bTIiC renders ai_coaching_mode_os options from ENUM-03 with IR placeholder copy; coaching-disclaimer-banner (ai_RNbBHYWq) shows static disclaimer text nodes
AC-3: coaching-save-btn (ai_RNbBHYWt) triggers workflow bTIhv parity: update user coaching preference and reflect saved value in dropdown
items.layout_notes: ~20 entities; single form card with disclaimer banner above save row — smaller tab suitable for one focused implement iteration.

items.title: Privacy tab, export, and account deletion
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - privacy (ai_RNbBHYWu): privacy-info-card sections (data, AI, employer, actions), privacy-export-btn, privacy-delete-btn, and delete-confirm-popup (ai_RNbBHYXY) with confirm/cancel workflows
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsPrivacyTab.vue renders ai_RNbBHYWu with data-bubble-id on privacy-info-card (ai_RNbBHYWv), privacy-sections (ai_RNbBHYWz), and nested privacy-data/ai/employer/actions section groups

AC-2: privacy-export-btn (ai_RNbBHYXS) initiates user data export via existing Supabase edge/RPC surface (read project/ contract only); privacy-delete-btn (ai_RNbBHYXV) opens delete-confirm-popup preserving header/actions hierarchy

AC-3: delete-confirm-popup (ai_RNbBHYXY) delete-confirm-btn (ai_RNbBHYXf) and delete-cancel-btn (ai_RNbBHYXe) execute bTIiN/bTIiS workflow parity for account deletion request — no project/ schema edits
items.layout_notes: ~38 tab entities plus page-level delete-confirm popup; stacked info sections with icon headers and action row at bottom — popup z-index above settings-main.

items.title: Security tab and password change workflow
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - security (ai_RNbBHYXg): security-form-card with current/new/confirm password inputs, security-change-pwd-btn, and security-reset-email-btn workflows via Supabase auth client
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsSecurityTab.vue preserves ai_RNbBHYXg hierarchy with data-bubble-id on security-form-card (ai_RNbBHYXh), security-form (ai_RNbBHYXl), and security-actions-row (ai_RNbBHYXv)
AC-2: Password inputs (ai_RNbBHYXo, ai_RNbBHYXr, ai_RNbBHYXu) use IR labels and masked input presentation — no placeholder-only fields

AC-3: security-change-pwd-btn (ai_RNbBHYXw) validates and updates password; security-reset-email-btn (ai_RNbBHYXx) triggers reset-email workflow matching Bubble bTIjK action — frontend auth only, no adapter passthrough
items.layout_notes: ~29 entities; vertical form card with three password field groups and dual action buttons in footer row.

items.title: Notifications tab and frequency save
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - notifications (ai_RNbBHYXy): notifications-form-card, notifications-freq-select dropdown, and notifications-save-btn persisting notification_frequency_text on user via Supabase client
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsNotificationsTab.vue renders ai_RNbBHYXy with data-bubble-id on notifications-form-card (ai_RNbBHYXz), notifications-card-header (ai_RNbBHYYA), and notifications-form (ai_RNbBHYYD)
AC-2: Dropdown notifications-freq-select (ai_RNbBHYYG) binds to notification_frequency option values with IR labels; static title/subtitle text matches Bubble copy
AC-3: notifications-save-btn (ai_RNbBHYYL) triggers save workflow (bTIjP cluster) updating user notification_frequency_text then shows saved state
items.layout_notes: ~16 entities; compact single-card tab — thin AC scope proportional to IR bulk.

items.title: Subscription tab, plan grid, and billing actions
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - subscription (ai_RNbBHYYc): current-tier card, RepeatingGroup subscription-plans-grid, plan card cells, subscription-billing-card, and plan-select/billing button workflows reading subscriptionplan rows via Supabase client
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsSubscriptionTab.vue preserves ai_RNbBHYYc with data-bubble-id on subscription-current-card (ai_RNbBHYYd), subscription-plans-grid (ai_RNbBHYYm), and subscription-billing-card (ai_RNbBHYYw)
AC-2: Plan RG cells (plan-free-card ai_RNbBHYYn and siblings) display name/price/features from subscriptionplan table; tier badge uses ENUM-04 tier_os labels

AC-3: plan-free-select-btn (ai_RNbBHYYv) and billing-update-btn (ai_RNbBHYZB) / billing-invoices-btn (ai_RNbBHYZC) wire to existing Supabase subscription/billing surfaces (read project/ for RPC names) — no project/ writes
items.layout_notes: ~42 entities; current plan summary card above horizontal/wrapping plan RG grid and billing card footer — RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref on grid.

items.title: Workplace tab and employer link workflow
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - workplace (ai_RNbBHYYM): workplace-info-card, privacy notice, workplace name/email form, and workplace-link-btn workflow associating user with workplace via Supabase client
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsWorkplaceTab.vue renders ai_RNbBHYYM with data-bubble-id on workplace-info-card (ai_RNbBHYYN), workplace-form (ai_RNbBHYYU), and workplace-privacy-notice (ai_RNbBHYYR)
AC-2: workplace-name-input (ai_RNbBHYYX) and workplace-email-input (ai_RNbBHYYa) preserve IR labels; workplace-privacy-text (ai_RNbBHYYT) matches static copy
AC-3: workplace-link-btn (ai_RNbBHYYb) triggers bTIja workflow parity: validate/create workplace link for current user using workplace table (read project/ schema only)
items.layout_notes: ~24 entities; info card with icon header, privacy callout, two-field form, and single primary link button.

items.title: Admin tab shell, paths/resources sub-tabs, and add popups
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - admin (ai_RNbBHYZD) shell: admin-header-card, admin-sub-tab-bar (paths/resources/plans/workplaces/analytics buttons), admin-tab-paths and admin-tab-resources panels with RepeatingGroups, plus add-path-popup (ai_RNbBHYbP) and add-resource-popup (ai_RNbBHYcN) CRUD workflows
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SettingsAdminShell.vue renders ai_RNbBHYZD with data-bubble-id on admin-header-card (ai_RNbBHYZE), admin-sub-tab-bar (ai_RNbBHYZK), and admin-sub-contents (ai_RNbBHYZQ) preserving nested sub-tab visibility

AC-2: admin-tab-paths (ai_RNbBHYZR) and admin-tab-resources (ai_RNbBHYZp) show toolbars, grids (admin-paths-grid/admin-resources-grid), and card templates with edit/delete buttons matching IR badges and tag rows

AC-3: add-path-popup and add-resource-popup open from admin-add-path-btn/admin-add-resource-btn; submit workflows create path/resource rows via Supabase client using ENUM-03 enums for mode/tier/sensitivity dropdowns — no project/ migrations
items.layout_notes: Admin panel ~153 entities total — this item covers shell plus paths/resources sub-journeys (~half admin IR) and two add popups; sub-tab bar sits below admin header card.

items.title: Admin plans/workplaces/analytics sub-tabs and add popups
items.scope: frontend — migrate admin-tab-plans (ai_RNbBHYaP), admin-tab-workplaces (ai_RNbBHYah), admin-tab-analytics (ai_RNbBHYay) panels with grids/stats, plus add-plan-popup (ai_RNbBHYdL) and add-workplace-popup (ai_RNbBHYdf) submit workflows
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: AdminPlansTab, AdminWorkplacesTab, and AdminAnalyticsTab render under admin-sub-contents with data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYaP, ai_RNbBHYah, and ai_RNbBHYay preserving toolbar + grid/analytics layouts

AC-2: admin-plans-grid and admin-workplaces-grid list subscriptionplan/workplace rows with edit/delete card actions; analytics grid shows stat cards (admin-stat-total-users, checkins, mode-dist, enrolled) from read-only Supabase aggregates

AC-3: add-plan-popup and add-workplace-popup forms submit via Supabase client creating subscriptionplan/workplace records; admin tab buttons ai_RNbBHYZN/ai_RNbBHYZO/ai_RNbBHYZP toggle visibility without breaking SET-09 paths/resources state
items.layout_notes: Completes admin tab (~remaining half of 153 entities): three sub-tab panels and two add popups; analytics uses read-only stat cards — no adapter unless server secret required.
